resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def constructRectangle(self, area: int) -> List[int]:
        w = int(area ** 0.5)
        while w:
            if area % w == 0:
                return [area // w, w]
            w -= 1
        return [area, 1]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(√area)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Start with the integer closest to the square root (the most balanced possible width) and decrement until the width divides the area; the corresponding length is area//width. This minimizes L-W while satisfying L≥W and L·W=area.
